channel.title: Blog on istvn.urbn
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on istvn.urbn

item.title: way to boshan
item.description: Listening to podcasts finally paid off when I stumbled upon Tamás Sajó, who made me realize that my old “poems” were just teenage angst.

item.title: quarter of debloat
item.description: I’m not a minimalist, but my digital clutter says otherwise. With thousands of photos and too many apps, it’s time for a purge!

item.title: after the snap
item.description: I’m ready for a “New Year, New Me” - with a healthy dose of skepticism. I just have to remember to actually write something!

item.title: marginal success
item.description: Turns out I’m better at dreaming up posts than actually writing them - maybe tweaking the blog itself will solve the problem.

item.title: init
item.description: In the early days of broadband Internet in Hungary, I had a blog to entertain myself; now I’m back, documenting my random adventures.
